burgers.name: Classic Chicken Burger
burgers.description: Crispy golden chicken fillet, fresh lettuce, juicy tomato slices and our signature house mayo — all packed in a toasted brioche bun.

burgers.name: Double Smash Burger
burgers.description: Two hand-smashed beef patties, melted American cheese, crunchy pickles and our tangy secret sauce in a sesame brioche bun.

burgers.name: Spicy Jalapeño Burger
burgers.description: Fiery crispy chicken fillet loaded with fresh jalapeños, pepper jack cheese, crispy onions and a zesty sriracha aioli.

burgers.name: BBQ Bacon Tower
burgers.description: A towering beauty — beef patty layered with crispy smoked bacon, smoky BBQ sauce, caramelised onion rings and sharp cheddar.

burgers.name: Veggie Supreme
burgers.description: Grilled veggie patty packed with creamy avocado, crunchy sprouts, roasted peppers and sweet honey mustard dressing.

burgers.name: Mushroom Swiss Melt
burgers.description: Juicy beef patty smothered in sautéed garlic mushrooms, rich Swiss cheese and a silky truffle aioli.

wraps.name: Grilled Chicken Wrap
wraps.description: Tender grilled chicken strips, crisp fresh veggies, cool sour cream and a punchy garlic herb sauce, all wrapped tight in a warm soft tortilla.

wraps.name: Crispy Paneer Wrap
wraps.description: Golden pan-fried paneer pieces, crunchy slaw, pickled onions and a refreshing mint chutney rolled in a toasted whole wheat tortilla.

wraps.name: BBQ Beef Wrap
wraps.description: Slow-cooked shredded beef, smoky house BBQ sauce, caramelised onions, jalapeño slices and melted cheese in a grilled tortilla.

wraps.name: Spicy Schezwan Wrap
wraps.description: Schezwan-tossed chicken with crispy fried noodles, spring onions, sesame seeds and a fiery red chilli sauce all in one bold wrap.

pizza.name: Trails Special Pizza
pizza.description: Our signature 9-inch loaded pizza featuring double mozzarella, spicy pepperoni, fresh basil and our secret house herb blend on a stone-baked crust.

pizza.name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
pizza.description: Smoky BBQ base loaded with succulent grilled chicken, sharp red onion rings, jalapeño slices and stretchy mozzarella on a crispy thin crust.

pizza.name: Margherita Royale
pizza.description: Classic San Marzano tomato sauce, hand-torn buffalo mozzarella and fresh basil leaves on a perfectly blistered wood-fired style crust.

pizza.name: Spicy Meat Feast
pizza.description: The ultimate carnivore pizza — Italian salami, beef mince, charred chicken and chorizo on a fiery arrabiata sauce base. Not for the faint-hearted!

pasta.name: Penne Arrabiata
pasta.description: Al dente penne pasta in a bold, slow-cooked spicy tomato sauce with fresh garlic, dried chillies, capers and torn fresh parsley.

pasta.name: Chicken Alfredo
pasta.description: Silky fettuccine in a rich parmesan cream sauce tossed with tender grilled chicken strips, cracked black pepper and garlic butter breadcrumbs.

pasta.name: Bolognese Classic
pasta.description: Rich, slow-simmered beef and pork ragu on fresh spaghetti topped with aged pecorino and a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil.

pasta.name: Pink Sauce Pasta
pasta.description: A dreamy blush pasta — rich tomato and fresh cream sauce with sautéed mushrooms, colourful bell peppers and a sprinkle of parmesan.

beverages.name: Classic Cola
beverages.description: Ice-cold Pepsi, 7Up or Mirinda — chilled to perfection and served in a frosty glass. The perfect companion for any meal.

beverages.name: Mango Mastani
beverages.description: A Pune classic — thick Alphonso mango shake piled high with a scoop of vanilla ice cream, roasted dry fruits and rose syrup.

beverages.name: Oreo Milkshake
beverages.description: Blended Oreo cookies with creamy vanilla ice cream, cold milk and a swirl of whipped cream. Thick, indulgent and absolutely addictive.

beverages.name: Fresh Lime Soda
beverages.description: Freshly squeezed lime juice with chilled sparkling water — available sweet, salted or both. Refreshing and light on the palate.

beverages.name: Watermelon Cooler
beverages.description: Freshly blended watermelon juice with a hint of fresh mint, a squeeze of lemon and a pinch of chaat masala for that extra kick.

desserts.name: Molten Lava Cake
desserts.description: Warm dark chocolate cake with a lusciously gooey molten centre, served with a scoop of vanilla bean ice cream and berry coulis.

desserts.name: Brownie Sundae
desserts.description: Dense, fudgy double-chocolate brownie warm from the oven, topped with vanilla ice cream, hot fudge sauce and crushed walnuts.

desserts.name: Churros with Dip
desserts.description: Crispy Spanish-style churros dusted with cinnamon sugar, served with a rich Belgian dark chocolate dipping sauce.

desserts.name: New York Cheesecake
desserts.description: Classic baked New York style cheesecake with a buttery graham cracker crust, topped with fresh seasonal berry coulis and strawberries.
